id.description: Unique identifier for the audit log event

user_name.description: Name of the user who performed the action

user_email.description: Email of the user who performed the action

role.description: Role of the user at the time of the action

ip_address.description: IP address from which the action was performed

event_type.description: Type of audit event (e.g., TOOL_PACK_CREATED, USER_UPDATED)
